intake_or_queue_object: Corroboration-first lead queue row below seeded evidence
minimum_metadata_fields: lead_id; discovered_from_public_url; access_date_utc; language; jurisdiction; source_surface_type; summary_of_claimed_event; public_artifact_type; rights_or_terms_note; translation_status; privacy_safety_screen
hard_exclusion_rules: Reject private messages, credentials, harassment material, doxxing, unverifiable screenshot-only claims, and leads whose only support is reposted social text with no recoverable public origin.
claim_ceiling_before_upgrade: Lead queue only; methods and route-design value, no empirical/legal/shared-claim support.
what_counts_as_real_progress_from_here: One populated queue row that preserves the original low-authority lead state and adds at least one higher-authority corroboration target plus one re-fetchable exact public anchor.
what_does_not_count_as_progress: Collecting more uncoded links, copying social content into case prose, or treating thread visibility as incident truth or seeded atlas evidence.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Lead queue; corroboration backlog; source-upgrade funnel; Figure 1 planned-frontier tooltip.
paper_thesis_use: Implements a reviewer-legible planned-frontier queue surface so LIMEN can show how obscure web leads would be governed without letting them contaminate denominators, evidence tiers, or legal interpretation.
local_evidence_paths: results/boost/limen-boost-013/frontier-intake-schema-board.tsv row sf14; results/boost/limen-boost-037/frontier-family-intake-contract.tsv row sf14; results/source-map/source-family-evidence-policy-matrix-v0.1.tsv row sf14; sources/source-family-ledger.tsv row sf14

intake_or_queue_object: Residual-frontier novelty/taxonomy stress queue below seeded evidence
minimum_metadata_fields: frontier_id; public_url; access_date_utc; language; jurisdiction; anomaly_type; why_current_taxonomy_is_stressed; public_artifact_type; authority_band; translation_status; dignity_and_sensationalism_screen
hard_exclusion_rules: Reject humiliation bait, satire without clarification/governance relevance, aesthetic-only curiosities, unverifiable reposts, and rows whose only value is sensational novelty without methods or taxonomy consequence.
claim_ceiling_before_upgrade: Residual-category queue only; bounded novelty/taxonomy stress-test use, no prevalence/legal/compliance support.
what_counts_as_real_progress_from_here: One populated queue row that states an explicit inclusion rule, an explicit exclusion check, an authority-band label, and whether the row remains methods-only or has a stronger corroboration route.
what_does_not_count_as_progress: Adding colorful anecdotes, widening residual counts, or using absurdity examples as if they proved prevalence, legality, or a new top-level taxonomy by themselves.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Residual-category queue; novelty-authority matrix; taxonomy stress-test panel; Figure 2 residual-methods note.
paper_thesis_use: Implements a count-silent residual-frontier surface so the first LIMEN paper and thesis can explain novelty-boundary handling without rewarding sensational or low-authority anomalies.
local_evidence_paths: results/boost/limen-boost-013/frontier-intake-schema-board.tsv row sf15; results/boost/limen-boost-037/frontier-family-intake-contract.tsv row sf15; results/source-map/source-family-evidence-policy-matrix-v0.1.tsv row sf15; results/taxonomy/taxonomy-delta-v0.1.md
